name: libclass-xsaccessor-perl
title: libclass-xsaccessor-perl
summary: Perl module providing fast XS accessors
description:
Perl module providing fast XS accessors
Class::XSAccessor implements fast XS accessors both for getting at and setting
an object attribute. Additionally, the module supports mutators and simple
predicates like those for testing the truth value of a variable. It works only
with objects that are implemented as ordinary hashes.
.
The XS accessor methods were between 1.6 and 2.5 times faster than typical
pure-perl accessors in some simple benchmarking. If you usually write clear
code, a factor of two speed-up is a good estimate.
.
Refer to Class::XSAccessor::Array (also included in libclass-xsaccessor-perl)
for an implementation that works with array-based objects.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libclass-xsaccessor-perl because Perl module providing fast XS accessors.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libclass-xsaccessor-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libclass-xsaccessor-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libclass-xsaccessor-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
